# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve system latency by 15%
* Optimize database queries for faster response times
* Refactor core algorithms for better computational efficiency
## Q2 Goals
* Implement real-time analytics dashboard
* Introduce user preference settings
* Develop API for external service integration
